ALRIGHT, I'M BACK BITCHES!!! AND WITH A HAPPY SASHA BOT AT THAT! Sorry for leaving you guys hangin' for so long there. Wanna know why? Well, just one word: LIFE. I'm pretty sure you guys know how that can be. Shit can just SUCK sometimes. But dw tho, everything's goin' alright with my fam & me. There's no need to worry. But for now, just indulge in this bot of everyone's favorite foodie! I really hope that you guys enjoy this one :)

Also I already have an idea in mind for another Sasha bot but it's a surprise tho so shhhh
